verification_instructions: 1. Verify asset files are moved to correct subdirectories. 2. Verify docs/ contains the three GDD markdown files. 3. Verify no asset files remain in project root. 4. Verify project still builds with ./gradlew build.
setup_instructions: JDK 17+ required. Run ./gradlew build to build.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Full access available.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing conventions.
key_patterns: State machine architecture in composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/core/. Current branch is feat/mvp1-kmp-foundation.
directory_structure: Root contains project files (gradle, composeApp/) plus many unorganized asset files (ZIPs, WAVs, PDF, Aseprite). Assets need to be moved into assets/ subdirectories. Game design docs need to be created in docs/.
